products.title: Discovery Set
products.description: Enter the world of our fragrances, where Swedish Myth meets nature's primal power. Each scent becomes a story that lives in the forests, meadows and cliffs, carried by wind and water. Includes 2ml samples of: 333 Övernatur 334 Blixt 335 Dísir Over 90% ingredients of natural origin

products.title: 335 Dísir Eau de Parfum
products.product_type: Iris Bloom / Cucumber Essence / Rice Steam
products.description: Floral dew and sunlight breathing over a still meadow. As the sun rises and falls on this scene, each violet, iris root and leaf beckons in your new destiny. Over 90% ingredients of natural origin Recyclable bottle and cap

products.title: 334 Blixt Eau de Parfum
products.product_type: Charged Ozone / Warm Amber / Black Powder
products.description: Lightning-charged air and rain hitting stone. A sudden rush of electricity suspended in time, releasing the full force of sparkling ozone charged with undertones of wood resin and black powder. Over 90% ingredients of natural origin Recyclable bottle and cap

products.title: 333 Övernatur Eau de Parfum
products.description: A deep immersive forest walk. Fir needles drift over the earthy forest floor and a cloud of spruce resin mixes with the warmth of oakmoss lichen. Over 90% ingredients of natural origin Recyclable bottle and cap
